title: More thinking on burnout
summary: Recently I took a month off work in between jobs to give myself a chance to reset. To be honest, the month felt more like a long weekend and it wasn't enough: most of the time was spent recharging and it didn't leave much behind for pursuing more fun activities. What I did achiev
